storyTarget: GTA-style cinematic open-world campaign with STATIC creator/social systems

missionLoop.label: Wake Up
missionLoop.objective: Mr. Stone wakes up in the top-floor penthouse. The city is below him and the first route objective loads.
missionLoop.stageDirection: Bedroom lights come alive, skyline reflection hits the glass, subtle STATIC tower hum underneath.

missionLoop.label: Elevator
missionLoop.objective: Walk out of the penthouse and enter the private elevator.
missionLoop.stageDirection: Camera follows behind. Door opens with gold tower lighting. Elevator panel shows valet floor.

missionLoop.label: Valet
missionLoop.objective: Exit elevator, wait for the luxury SUV, get in, and trigger STATIC Radio.
missionLoop.stageDirection: Valet pulls up the black SUV. Door opens. Radio display boots with STATIC Blues queued.

missionLoop.label: Drive
missionLoop.objective: Drive from STATIC Tower down toward Market Walk before the rooftop.
missionLoop.stageDirection: Wide chase camera, city lights streak, Radio comes alive, billboards react to Mr. Stone route and mall arrival.

missionLoop.label: Mall Stop
missionLoop.objective: Stop at the mall, buy clothes and jewelry, and update Mr. Stone’s visible status before the rooftop.
missionLoop.stageDirection: SUV pulls up to Market Walk. Boutique lights flare. Jewelry case opens. Fit/status updates before he exits back to the vehicle.

missionLoop.label: Radio Arrival
missionLoop.objective: Pull up, step out, enter the Radio building, and ride elevator to rooftop.
missionLoop.stageDirection: SUV stops at curb. Crowd audio rises. Security recognizes Mr. Stone and clears the path.

missionLoop.label: VIP Rooftop
missionLoop.objective: Escort Mr. Stone to VIP, give him a drink and cigar, then seat him on the VIP couch while people dance.
missionLoop.stageDirection: Host greets him. Bottle service glow. Crowd dances around the rooftop while the skyline breathes.

missionLoop.label: Vibe Mode
missionLoop.objective: Get back in the SUV, turn on Vibe Mode, roll down the window, and look out at the skyscrapers while STATIC Blues plays.
missionLoop.stageDirection: Camera slides into first person. Window lowers. City wind, crowd spillover, neon reflections, blues track.

missionLoop.label: Return
missionLoop.location: Mountain road back to STATIC Tower
missionLoop.objective: Far third-person shot follows the SUV back up the mountain. Mr. Stone exits, tips valet, and walks back in.
missionLoop.stageDirection: Camera pulls wide. STATIC Tower dominates the summit. Valet gets tipped. Doors close behind him.
